name: jstack
description: Agent workflow skills: file/load active items, hand off sessions, audit completed work trust-nothing (a subagent reviews from source and reports a triaged verdict back to the session, or a fresh terminal you drive), reverify a whole day's shipped work across every repo against the timeline, show the result of the current topic in its real viewer, commit + push session work, install bundled rules. PreToolUse hook injects path-matched rules at edit time regardless of launch CWD. SessionEnd hook spawns a validated post-session review (state.md + follow-ups + timeline via bin/log_event). Portable across machines via userConfig — no hardcoded paths.

agent_root.title: Agent workspaces root
agent_root.description: Directory that contains your per-agent workspaces — each as {Name}/ with a CLAUDE.md and an active/ folder. JStack resolves every agent path under here. Example: ~/Agents or /Users/you/Projects/Agents.

repo_root.title: Code repos root
repo_root.description: Directory under which /jstack:day-audit discovers the git repos to audit (scanned to depth 2). Leave empty to default to the parent of agent_root — the usual layout where code repos are siblings of the agent workspaces. Example: ~/Projects or /Users/you/Work.

agent_registry.title: Agent registry (agents.json)
agent_registry.description: Path to the agent registry that maps each agent to its workspace and the repos it owns ({agent: {workspace, repos: [...]}}). /jstack:day-audit reads it to dispatch each repo's regression audit under its owning agent (which loads that agent's domain context). Leave empty to default to {agent_root}/agents.json. Absent/unreadable → every repo gets a generic auditor.

followup_backend.title: Follow-up backend
followup_backend.description: How /jstack:save files a follow-up reminder. One of: none | todo | reminders | slack. 'todo' appends to the followup_target file; 'reminders' adds to the macOS Reminders list named in followup_target; 'slack' POSTs to the webhook in env var SLACK_FOLLOWUP_WEBHOOK. Default: none.

followup_target.title: Follow-up target
followup_target.description: Backend-specific target. For 'todo': a file path (default <agent_root>/followups.md). For 'reminders': the Reminders list name (default 'Follow-ups'). Ignored for 'slack' and 'none'.
